sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70112" key="nekrotafiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρο-τᾰφικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n70112.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pertaining to burial,</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κηδεια</itype> ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Grenf.:68:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68.6</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
